examples: A note of defiance entered her voice.
At least they will see, I hope, pictures of their father being hauled off to jail in defiance.
Angry protestors with clenched fists shouted their defiance.
Just listen to Dominique de Villepin, the prime minister, who came to embody anti-American defiance.
"I'm already on to thinking about the next record, " he said with defiance and charm.
